title: Wave 31 - Manager assignment center parity
description: Coordinate architecture, backend, mobile, and QA work to add a manager assignment center built on top of priority queue and assignment flows so managers can review, inspect, and complete assignment work with deterministic API and UI states.
acceptance_criteria: Wave 31 scope is documented for architect/backend/mobile/qa
Jira epic can be created directly from the task file
Scope aligns with manager assignment center parity and keeps executor load partitioned
